name: Cherry Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the syrup from canned cherries. If the syrup lacks tartness and flavor, add juice of 1 lemon.
2. Combine the cherry syrup and sugar. Heat rapidly to boiling.
3. Stir constantly before and while boiling. Add the fruit pectin and stir constantly.
4. Bring to a full rolling boil. Remove from heat, skim, and let cool.
Sirup from any canned fruit may be substituted for the cherry syrup. The Household Searchlight
